issues.title: Residential Bin Lid Damaged
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
issues.shortDescription: Request repairs for a damaged bin, replacement of a missing bin, exchange of a bin to a different size, request for an additional bin or, return of a bin. Note: This request is applicable only for residential properties using City-issued bins.

issues.title: Road Pothole / Road Damage
issues.shortDescription: Report pothole or road damage or uneven pavement on a City of Toronto roadway.

issues.title: Property Standards and Maintenance Violations
issues.shortDescription: Report a property that does not meet the City's municipal code or rules on property maintenance and occupancy, such as pest control, retaining walls, vacant buildings, roofs, stairs, elevator, ventilation, dust from residential construction, clothing box.

issues.title: Sidewalk Snow Clearing Required
issues.shortDescription: Request snow clearing of a sidewalk adjacent to a roadway....

issues.title: Injured - Wildlife
issues.shortDescription: Report wildlife such as raccoons, bats, deer, birds, squirrels, foxes that are sick, injured, or showing signs of trauma.

issues.title: Pick up Dead Wildlife
issues.shortDescription: Request to pick up dead wildlife such as raccoons or skunks on City or private property. Note: Dead wildlife on private property must be bagged and placed on the curb for pick-up.

issues.title: Road Plowing Request
issues.shortDescription: Request road or expressway plowing ....

issues.title: General Pruning
issues.shortDescription: Request pruning, mulching, stemming, stumping, watering, verifying tree ownership, branch clean-up, stakes and ties, roots trip hazard, carpenter ants, termites or other maintenance requests for City trees on the road allowance or in City parks.

issues.title: Residential - Garbage Day Collection - Not Picked Up
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
Residential - Garbage Day Collection - Not Picked Up
issues.shortDescription: Report missed collection of garbage, organic waste, yard waste, oversized items, Christmas trees or electronic waste.

issues.title: Residential Bin Body or Handle Damaged
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
Residential Bin Body or Handle Damaged
issues.shortDescription: Request repairs for a damaged bin, replacement of a missing bin, exchange of a bin to a different size, request for an additional bin or, return of a bin. Note: This request is applicable only for residential properties using City-issued bins.

issues.title: Driveway Blocked By Plowed Snowbank
issues.shortDescription: Request snow clearing of a residential driveway that is blocked by a plowed snowbank (windrow)....

issues.title: Residential Oversized/Electronics Item Day Collection Not Picked Up
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
Residential Oversized/Electronics Item Day Collection Not Picked Up
issues.shortDescription: Report missed collection of garbage, organic waste, yard waste, oversized items, Christmas trees or electronic waste.

issues.title: Waste or Illegal Dumping on Private Property
categoryPath: Waste or Illegal Dumping on Private Property
issues.shortDescription: Report a concern about the accumulation of waste, litter, standing water or witnessed illegal dumping on private property (e.g. derelict vehicles, accumulation of refuse, stagnant water in unused pools).

issues.title: Residential Organics Not Picked Up
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
issues.shortDescription: Report missed collection of garbage, organic waste, yard waste, oversized items, Christmas trees or electronic waste.

issues.title: Amplified or Musical Instrument Noise
issues.shortDescription: Report amplified sound made by any electronic devices incorporating one or more loudspeakers.

issues.title: Tree Emergency Clean-Up
issues.shortDescription: Request clean-up of a City-owned tree that has fallen or poses a hazard to pedestrians or traffic.

issues.title: Clean up Illegal Dumping on City Road Allowance
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
Street Litter Bins and Cleanup of City Roads and Sidewalks
Garbage, Debris and Needles on the City Road Allowance
Clean up Illegal Dumping on City Road Allowance
issues.shortDescription: Report an overflowing street litter bin, request to clean up debris, litter, needles, human waste or illegally dumped items on City road, sidewalk, boulevard or laneway.

issues.title: Sewer Service Line-Blocked
issues.shortDescription: Report a blocked, flooding or backed up sewer. Request repair of a sewer service clean-out.

issues.title: Clean up Debris on Road
issues.shortDescription: Request road cleaning or removing debris or litter on a City roadway

issues.title: Residential - Recycling Day Collection - Not Picked Up
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
Residential - Recycling Day Collection - Not Picked Up
issues.shortDescription: Report missed collection of garbage, organic waste, yard waste, oversized items, Christmas trees or electronic waste.

issues.title: Traffic Signal Repair
issues.shortDescription: Report traffic signal timing, damaged or malfunctioning (stuck, too long/short) traffic signals including vehicle, transit, pedestrian signals and flashing beacons. Request traffic signal information.

issues.title: Hazardous Waste Pick-up
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
issues.shortDescription: Request pick-up of Multi-residential Household Hazardous Waste (HHW). Note: Household Hazardous Waste pick-up is only available for single-family, apartments above businesses and multi-residential households.

issues.title: Zoning Regulations Violations
issues.shortDescription: Submit complaints related to violation of zoning bylaw such as illegal use of property, garage sale, group homes/second suites, short-term rental, parking, residential swimming pool rentals and operating business from home.

issues.title: Report an Encroachment on City Property
issues.shortDescription: Report encroachments (buildings, poles, walls, gates, fences, dumpsters/disposal bins) on the public road allowance (roads, sidewalks, boulevards, or bike lanes) that were not installed or constructed by the City.

issues.title: Residential: Garbage Bin: Missing
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
issues.shortDescription: Request repairs for a damaged bin, replacement of a missing bin, exchange of a bin to a different size, request for an additional bin or, return of a bin. Note: This request is applicable only for residential properties using City-issued bins.

issues.title: Missing / Damaged Street or Traffic Signs
categoryPath: Missing / Damaged Street or Traffic Signs
issues.shortDescription: Request investigation of temporary condition, warning, regulatory signs or report missing or damaged street and traffic signs.

issues.title: Replace Missing Residential Organic Bin
categoryPath: Waste Collection, Bins, Litter and Needle Cleanup
issues.shortDescription: Request repairs for a damaged bin, replacement of a missing bin, exchange of a bin to a different size, request for an additional bin or, return of a bin. Note: This request is applicable only for residential properties using City-issued bins.

issues.title: Catch Basin - Blocked / Flooding
issues.shortDescription: Request maintenance of a City catch basin that is damaged, covered with debris or litter, blocked and flooding, or where the cover is missing, damaged, or loose.

issues.title: Long Grass and Prohibited Plants on Private Property
issues.shortDescription: Report a private property that appears to have long grass above 20 cm long and prohibited plants.

issues.title: Construction Noise
issues.shortDescription: Report noise from construction activities, equipment, or crane work (including erection, dismantling, or any crane work requiring road closure) outside permitted hours. Examples include noise from building repair, demolition, or excavation.

issues.shortDescription: Request inspection of damaged concrete sidewalk on City property.

issues.title: Boulevard Plow Damage
issues.shortDescription: Report damage caused by a snow plow to a boulevard or sidewalk. A boulevard is the area between the curb and a private property line.

issues.title: Request Water Service Turn Off
categoryPath: Request Water Service Turn-On or Off
issues.shortDescription: Request to turn the City's water service on or off (e.g., to complete repairs or renovate a home or building, to conduct work on a sprinkler system, if you are going on an extended vacation). Appointments can be booked ahead of time, within four-hour time

issues.title: Sidewalk - Cleaning
issues.shortDescription: Request repair of interlocking bricks, concrete surfaces, walkways, accessibility ramps or tactile pavers. Request installation of accessibility ramps or tactile pavers. Request sidewalk cleaning.

issues.title: Road - Sinking
issues.shortDescription: Request removal of debris and litter for a City road. Request repair of a gravel road, maintenance hole lid, pothole, uneven pavement, sinking road or road shoulder.

issues.title: Moving Motor Vehicle Noise
issues.shortDescription: Report noise from moving or stationary vehicles.

issues.title: Unreasonable and Persistent Noise
issues.shortDescription: Report any unreasonable and persistent noise and/or sound-induced vibration. Vibration is felt physically and transmitted through structures, liquids, surfaces, or the ground.

issues.title: Road Salting Request
issues.shortDescription: Request salting of a road with icy conditions....

issues.title: Animal Noise
issues.shortDescription: Report excessive or persistent animal noise.

issues.title: Water Service Line-Check Water Service Box
issues.shortDescription: Request for Toronto Water to check or repair a water service box on the sidewalk or front lawn. Note: A water service box is a round brown valve on the sidewalk or front lawn. Service boxes give the City access to shut off water to your home.
